name: SHORT EXPIRY - CLEARANCE: Bulk pack of 11 - Reflex Cat Treats - Lick Snack, Poultry, Liver & Salmon (6 x 15g) 90g
description: Reflex Cat Treats - Lick Snack , choose from Poultry, Liver & Biotin or Salmon & Inulin. Both are extremely satisfying liquid snacks for your cat. Reward good behaviour with these fun and delicious treats made with the highest quality ingredients and bursting with flavour. Carton of 11 Packs of 6 snacks. INGREDIENTS: Poultry, Liver & Biotin: Meat and animal derivatives (4% poultry, 4% liver), milk and dairy products, biotin (20 ?g). Salmon & Inulin: Meat and animal derivatives, fish and fish derivatives (4% salmon), milk and dairy products, inulin (0.1%) NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 20 Oil Content (%) - 0.3 Crude Ash (%) - 3 Crude Fiber (%) - 1 FEEDING RECOMMENDATIONS: As a snack in addition to meals. Use a spoon or bowl. This product does not replace your cat's daily food requirement. Serve at room temperature.
